strengths: Disciplined motif (vast off-white, hairline rule, sumi wash, vertical glyph column) carried across all six pages
Highly domain-specific: shiho, kinhin, dokusan, zazenkai, dana slider, 5-minute silence preroll on dharma audio
Concrete layouts including vertical lineage chain with sumi connector and hairline waveform rows
Quiet but functional interactions tied to contemplative intent (no checkout flow on dana)
Six distinct pages with differentiated layout patterns
weaknesses: Six landing 'breaths' risk feeling formulaic if poorly paced
Single-stroke etiquette icons could read generic without strong assets

strengths: Distinctive editorial-broadsheet voice differentiates clearly while honoring seed palette
Seasonal sekki marker pinned to right edge is a memorable, domain-authentic motif
Concrete content: rice-and-oil monthly giving, roof restoration fund, retreatant scholarship, last-year ledger
Layout patterns vary meaningfully: horizontal genealogical lineage, ledger schedule, three-column audio archive, zoned etiquette by Sanmon/Genkan/Zendo/Refectory/Garden
Realistic interactions: one-question-per-screen retreat form, filterable audio by teacher/theme/year
Mobile behavior thoughtfully described (horizontal lineage becomes vertical indented outline)
weaknesses: Combining schedule and retreats on one page risks density unless ledger discipline holds
Three-column audio archive may feel dense for contemplative tone
Horizontal-scroll lineage can be awkward on trackpads if not paged
